'''Rafa III''' was a terrestrial<ref name="LCMS" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Rafa system/Legends|Rafa system]],<ref name="CSWE" /> a part of the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA" /> It occupied the third [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="CSWE" /> around the Rafa [[Star system/Legends|system's]] [[Rafa sun|sun]],<ref name="LCMS" /> and along with the rest of the Rafa was situated on the [[Arleen Loop]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], which connected it to the [[Arleen system/Legends|Arleen]] and [[Dela system/Legends|Dela systems]].<ref name="TEA" />

Rafa III was the site of deep-bore hardrock [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations that utilized giant [[Laserdrill/Legends|laser drill]]-bits.<ref name="LCMS" /> By [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the [[Star Wars: The Lando Calrissian Adventures|''The Lando Calrissian Adventures'']] trilogy, of which ''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]'' is the first installment, between [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]] and [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]].</ref> a pair of the planet's [[Drill/Legends|drill]]-bits had been gifted as souvenirs to the [[Poly Pyramid]], a [[Cantina/Legends|bar]] in the system's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|settlement]] [[Teguta Lusat]] on the planet [[Rafa IV]]. There, the drill-bits were used to prop open the inner doors of the establishment, which was frequented by vacationing [[Miner/Legends|miners]] from Rafa III.<ref name="LCMS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rafa III was first mentioned in ''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]'', the [[1983]] first entry in [[Star Wars: The Lando Calrissian Adventures|''The Lando Calrissian Adventures'']] trilogy of novels by [[L. Neil Smith]].<ref name="LCMS" /> "[[Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are]]," a [[1990]] [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|roleplaying game]] source article published in [[Voyages SF 13|''Voyages SF'' 13]], placed the Rafa system, and therefore Rafa III, in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. Since that article was released outside of the [[Lucas Licensing]] process,<ref name="Twinkle">{{VoyagesCite|13|Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are}}</ref> it was considered non-[[canon]]ical with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="UnlicensedStatus">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently overrode the ''Voyages SF'' 13 placement by establishing that the Rafa system was instead situated in grid square T-8 as part of the Centrality.<ref name="TEA" />
